cards.title: Churn Signal Detection
cards.body: Combine product usage drops, support ticket sentiment, and invoice payment delays into a single at-risk score, refreshed nightly. Accounts crossing the threshold land in a #cs-at-risk Slack channel with the trigger explained in plain English and a recommended next play.
cards.metric: CS teams catch 60–70% of churn 30+ days earlier

cards.title: Support Ticket Routing
cards.body: Intercom and Zendesk tickets get classified by topic, urgency, and plan tier, then routed to the right on-call engineer or CS rep with a draft reply grounded in your docs. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd train the router on your last 3 months of tickets so it mirrors how your lead actually triages.
cards.metric: ~50% drop in mis-routed tickets; p50 response <15 min

cards.title: Onboarding Nudges
cards.body: New accounts get a behavior-driven nudge sequence — Slack DM from the CSM if they're a top-tier account, templated email otherwise — tied to activation milestones in your product. Stuck users get a real human ping; on-track users are left alone.
cards.metric: ~20% lift in week-1 activation; fewer CSM babysitting hours

ctaLine: Typical build is 2–3 weeks for a SaaS team of 5–20. Book a call — we'll map your activation funnel on-screen and point at the three cheapest wins.
